{
  "claims": [
    "The budget includes innovative plans to address the climate crisis.",
    "The Governor proposes several investments and strategies to increase carbon sequestration.",
    "The budget includes $225 million for new construction and retrofitting of community resiliency centers.",
    "These community resiliency centers will serve both as community evacuation and emergency response centers.",
    "The budget allocates $260.9 million over the next five years to improve broadband infrastructure.",
    "The proposal aims to expand healthcare to low-income senior citizens, regardless of immigration status.",
    "Access to primary and preventive care enables doctors to identify and treat health issues early on.",
    "The Golden State Teacher Grant program was created to help support and recruit more teachers.",
    "The budget proposes additional investments in education workforce development and teacher recruitment."
  ]
}
